title: pasaniopsis sieboldii var. rotundifolia
intro:
Pasaniopsis sieboldii var. rotundifolia is a lesser-known plant species with various names, including the Japanese name "taihotsu," however, I was unable to find any reliable information about the plant itself.

However,  I can provide information about the plant known as  "Siebold's Pasaniopsis" and a related plant, "Siebold's Pasaniopsis var. rotundifolia", which is actually known as  a variant of the "Siebold's Pasaniopsis" plant. 

This plant,  "Siebold's Pasaniopsis" is actually known as "Siebold's Pasaniopsis (Pasaniopsis sieboldii)" and not the rotundifolia variant. 

The Siebold's Pasaniopsis  is a type of plant in the genus Pasaniopsis, which is in the family Annonaceae.
